---
title: "Final Q2"
author: "your name here"
date: "2026-05-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(tigerstats)
fishData = read.csv('fish.csv')
```

Final Q2.   This question is based on the Fish.csv data set.   The research questions is this:  "For the Bream species, What is the best predictor of the fish's weight -- Height, Width, or Length3?

In the Fish.csv data set, the variables are Species and Weight.

Your mission, should you decide to accept, is to analyze the Fish data for these species, and answer the research question. 

# Introduction

# Methods

# Data Description

## Graphial Description 

## Numberical Description

# Inferential results

# Summary and Conclustions
